name: Transportation and Logistics Systems, Inc.
summary: Transportation and Logistics Systems, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides tractor-trailer and box truck deliveries of packages on the east coast of the United States. The company offers package delivery services primarily in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Georgia, Florida, Ohio, and Tennessee, principally for Amazon and its customers, and for other customers. It also provides various logistics services to Amazon and storage solutions for Amazon's customers with limited storage facilities. The company is based in Jupiter, Florida.
